# Footprint Finder

> Footprint Finder scans your inbox to find every account, breach, and data-broker listing tied to your email — then helps you delete or opt out. Free scan, monthly rescans, real-time alerts.

Footprint Finder is a privacy management service for individuals. It uses read-only OAuth metadata (sender, subject, date — never message body) to discover services where your email is registered, classifies them by activity and risk, and provides one-click cleanup actions (delete account, unsubscribe, opt out under CCPA). Data-broker scans surface where your name, address, and phone are publicly listed across 45+ US people-search sites.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, free scan entry point, pricing summary.
- [Free Scan](/free-scan): Instant breach + exposure check by email (no account required).
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans — $15/mo or $79/yr.
- [Parent Scan](/parents): One-time $39 scan for an elderly parent's email (scam-focused).
- [Enterprise](/enterprise): Shadow IT audits and B2B offering.
- [Compare](/vs): Footprint Finder vs DeleteMe, Incogni, Optery, Kanary, Mine.
- [Data-Broker Removal Guides](/remove-from): Free opt-out instructions for 45+ US brokers.
- [Blog](/blog): Privacy tool comparisons and guides.
- [Browser Extension](/extension): Chrome extension for in-context cleanup.
- [Help](/help): FAQ explaining server-side metadata scanning.
- [Demo](/demo): Interactive demo with sample data.
